hooks.command: dir=$(cat | jq -r '.cwd | split("/") | .[-2:] | join("/")'); if [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ]; then osascript -e "display notification \"Slave is done\" with title \"Claude Code ($dir)\""; else p=$(pgrep -x dunst | head -1); [ -n "$p" ] && export DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=$(tr '\0' '\n' </proc/$p/environ | sed -n 's/^DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=//p'); notify-send -u normal -i dialog-information "Claude Code ($dir)" 'Slave is done'; fi

dir=$(cat | jq -r '.cwd | split("/") | .[-2:] | join("/")'); if [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ]; then osascript -e "display notification \"Slave has a question for you\" with title \"Claude Code ($dir)\""; else p=$(pgrep -x dunst | head -1); [ -n "$p" ] && export DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=$(tr '\0' '\n' </proc/$p/environ | sed -n 's/^DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=//p'); notify-send -u normal -i dialog-information "Claude Code ($dir)" 'Slave has a question for you'; fi

dir=$(cat | jq -r '.cwd | split("/") | .[-2:] | join("/")'); if [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ]; then osascript -e "display notification \"Slave needs your permission\" with title \"Claude Code ($dir)\""; else p=$(pgrep -x dunst | head -1); [ -n "$p" ] && export DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=$(tr '\0' '\n' </proc/$p/environ | sed -n 's/^DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=//p'); notify-send -u normal -i dialog-information "Claude Code ($dir)" 'Slave needs your permission'; fi
